headline: The Dividend Portfolio That Can Cover a Silicon Valley House Payment
summary: A median Silicon Valley home can easily run near $1.6 million to $2 million, and today’s mortgage rates can turn that into a roughly $10,000 to $12,000 monthly housing payment once principal, interest, property taxes, and insurance are included. Covering that bill with dividends alone means building a portfolio that throws off roughly $120,000 to ... The Dividend Portfolio That Can Cover a Silicon Valley House Payment
